---
title: "Reproducible project template"
date: last-modified
---

A flexible template for reproducible slides with Quarto, GitHub Actions, and GitHub Pages.

- Online version: [robinlovelace.github.io/reproducible-project-template](https://robinlovelace.github.io/reproducible-project-template)
- Source code: [github.com/Robinlovelace/reproducible-project-template](https://github.com/Robinlovelace/reproducible-project-template)

![Deploy status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/Robinlovelace/reproducible-project-template/publish.yml?branch=main&label=deploy) Last updated: {{< meta date >}}

{{< include _readme-body.md >}}
